name: REDCapAgentToolTemplate
description: Template External Module for building SecureChatAI agent tools. Copy this module and rename it to create new tool EMs.

example_greet.description: Agent tool: return a greeting for the given name

example_add.description: Agent tool: add two numbers together

agent-tool-definitions.name: example.greet
agent-tool-definitions.description: Return a personalized greeting message for the given name.

formal.description: If true, use formal greeting style

agent-tool-definitions.name: example.add
agent-tool-definitions.description: Add two numbers together and return the sum.

project-settings.name:
Enable Debug Logging
(optional) Requires installation and configuration of emLogger

system-settings.name: Enable Debug Logging (system-wide)(optional) Requires installation and configuration of emLogger
